subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Mary C. Bell, spoken on 1912-10-04
subcodes.first_line: I have brought glad tidings. I hope you may be set afire with the love of God. May you discover a new spirit and attain a new power. May you become the cause of guidance
subcodes.subjects: @Theosophy, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @compassion; kindness
